prompt: Create a vertical anime-style cinematic portrait of an elegant young woman in a glowing night garden, shown in close-up side profile from the chest up as she quietly savors whiskey. She has dark navy-black loosely pinned into a messy low bun with wispy strands across her face, warm amber rim light catching the hair, refined features, long eyelashes, and a calm relaxed Friday-night mood. She wears a deep midnight blue kimono-like robe, a delicate gold pendant necklace, and long dangling gold earrings. Her right hand lifts a cut-crystal tumbler to her lips; the glass contains amber whiskey, with sparkling highlights, facets, and golden reflections. Surround her with exactly 8 prominent glowing yellow evening primrose blossoms: 1 large blurred blossom on the far left background, 1 small blurred blossom near the left middle background, 2 blossoms near the upper right, 1 blossom at mid-right beside her shoulder, 1 blossom in the lower right foreground, 1 blossom centered near her chest, and 1 blossom near the lower center foreground; add additional tiny golden bokeh particles but no extra distinct foreground flowers. Use dramatic warm golden flower light against a deep blue night background, shallow depth of field, soft painterly detail, elegant romantic atmosphere, luminous petals, realistic glass refraction, subtle firefly-like specks, and a high-detail polished illustration finish. No text, no watermark, no border.
